mano_cua.result_summary: 部署失败。examples/simple使用rescripts(CRA 3.4.3)，webpack编译阶段server静默退出，Node 16/18均复现。尝试了SKIP_PREFLIGHT_CHECK=true、--openssl-legacy-provider、--max-old-space-size=4096、直接react-scripts start等方法均失败。webpack dev server启动后compilation阶段进程消失，无错误输出。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: rescripts/react-scripts webpack compilation silently crashes on both Node 16 and Node 18.

deploy_notes: commit 7c22d283f8, CRA 3.4.3 + rescripts, examples/simple. webpack compilation silently dies.
